global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the product and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time offer for the BoltCart app.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bold 'SALE' badge in a contrasting color, located at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: A prominent headline reading 'Your next favorite pick' in a large, bold font, centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Install now' in a clear, readable font, located just below the headline.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: The price '€29.99' displayed in a slightly smaller font, positioned below the call to action button.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in a simple font, located at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Background elements
elements.description: A light, neutral background that enhances the visibility of the text and buttons without distracting from the main message.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, BoltCart logo, sale badge, main headline, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the sale badge is at the top right, the headline is centered at the bottom, and the CTA is below the headline.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BoltCart, SALE, Your next favorite pick, Only this weekend, €29.99, Install now, UGC
